Now that we've covered the different groups, you have the tools to be more mindful of your own style and recognize your counterpart style. Remember the I am normal paradox. Thinking that you are normal is one of the most damaging assumptions you can make. You unconsciously project your own style on the other side. That said, the golden rule is wrong. Instead, the black swan rule is, don't treat others the way you want to be treated. Treat them the way they need to be treated.
